title: zinnia laevis
intro: Zinnia laevis, also known as the hairy zinnia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Zinnia laevis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
